content.text: How can I dynamically prepare all necessary inputs, including internal states and additional data, before processing a single step in my sequence model?
What happens if `self._input_type` is neither 'sequence' nor anything else?
If an unexpected type is provided for `self._input_type`, the function will enter the `else` block. If `additional_inputs` are present, it calls `merge_inputs(None, ...)` using only those extras.
Thanks, that clarifies how input types affect merging!
